name: plannotator
description: Interactive Plan Review for Claude Code - annotate plans visually, share with team, automatically send feedback
author: backnotprop

scripts.build:pi: bun run build:review && bun run build:hook && bun run --cwd apps/pi-extension build
scripts.build: bun run build:hook && bun run build:opencode
scripts.test: bun test --path-ignore-patterns 'packages/ui/**' --path-ignore-patterns 'packages/editor/**' && bun test --cwd packages/ui && bun test --cwd packages/editor
scripts.typecheck: bash apps/pi-extension/vendor.sh && bunx tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p packages/ai/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p packages/server/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p packages/ui/tsconfig.slice5.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p packages/editor/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p apps/pi-extension/tsconfig.json
